content: openScope aircraft-commands.md (official docs): commands are short verb codes typed per-callsign and chainable in a single transmission, e.g. 'AAL123 fh 270' (fly heading), 'AAL123 c 30' (climb/descend to FL), 'AAL123 + 250'/'- 250' (speed), 'AAL123 pd FIXNAME' (proceed direct), 'AAL123 i 26' (cleared ILS approach, aircraft follows localizer/glideslope automatically), 'AAL123 cto' (cleared takeoff). Separate 'scope commands' handle handoffs, datablock repositioning, and display settings distinct from aircraft commands.
